# Prasterone 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Prasterone 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Prasterone</strong> 目前有 <strong>4 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Prasterone 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Intrarosa is indicated for the treatment of vulvar and vaginal atrophy in postmenopausal women having moderate to severe symptoms.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>heparin cofactor 2 deficiency（100.0%）</li>
<li>factor 5 excess with spontaneous thrombosis（100.0%）</li>
<li>antithrombin deficiency type 2（100.0%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia（99.9%）</li>
<li>pediatric systemic lupus erythematosus（99.2%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.2%）</li>
<li>thrombophilia due to protein S deficiency, autosomal recessive（99.1%）</li>
<li>scleroderma (disease)（99.1%）</li>
<li>complement component 4a deficiency（99.0%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/prasterone/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
